ops.text:
PRE-REGISTERED VERIFY PROTOCOL (verify lane for E21 "session-correlation influence audit", ledger 40a51392). Cap $0, pure compute, no LLM spend.

Goal: independently recompute E21 headline with my OWN code (do not trust analyze.py or the pre-existing verify.py) and confirm (a) recomputation match, (b) the pre-registered success criterion was evaluated as registered with no goalpost move, (c) PENDING-E15 no promote/kill verdict was stated.

Headline under test: {sessions=813, pairs=6731, max_pairs_per_session=291, effective_sample_size=4019, effective_sample_size_reduction=0.597, effective_sample_size_ci95=[3944,4104], weights_path=out/session-weights.parquet}.

Method (verify_independent.py, own implementation):
1. Direct pyarrow read of dataset/watcher/train.parquet -> sessions/pairs/max/mean/median/p90/gini/singletons/top10/label split, independent of load_train_rows.
2. Own byte-5-gram substring shingles (frozenset of raw 5-byte windows, NO rolling hash) + own Jaccard + own union-find. Exact within-session pairwise clustering at thresholds {0.8,0.6,0.5}; ESS = sum(1/cluster_size). Text = WatcherRow.draft_text() (the definition of the input, not the metric under audit).
3. Delivered out/session-weights.parquet invariants: 6731 rows, id unique, ids match train order, weight==w_ngram08, weight*cluster_size==1 elementwise, sum(weight), sum(1/cluster_size).
4. out/global_near_dup_pairs_j08.csv same_session flags recomputed against session-of-id map (mismatch count must be 0).
5. Bootstrap CI reproduction (SEED=1729, 2000 session-block resamples) on parquet default weights.

SUCCESS CRITERION for CONFIRMED: my independent ESS at J0.8 == 4019 (reduction 0.597) to integer; distribution headline (813/6731/291) exact; parquet invariant sum(weight)==4019==n within-session clusters; CSV same_session mismatch==0; bootstrap CI ~= [3942,4104]; and no promote/kill verdict in E21 ledger (PENDING-E15 respected).
